title: Oracle posts strong Q3 FY2026 results as AI and cloud demand accelerates
summary: Oracle reported third-quarter FY2026 revenue growth and record remaining performance obligations. For the Oracle APEX market, that matters because Oracle continues to invest aggressively in AI infrastructure, cloud capacity, and long-term enterprise platform development.

title: Oracle AI World Tour 2026 puts AI-ready Oracle workloads in focus
summary: In its partner announcement around Oracle AI World Tour 2026, Microsoft highlighted Oracle Database@Azure, security, migration, and AI-optimized infrastructure. For APEX customers, it reinforces the year’s core pattern: modernize the data and workflow stack first, then layer AI on top.

title: OpenAI explores a new enterprise channel through private equity partnerships
summary: Reuters reported that OpenAI is in talks with major private equity firms about a joint enterprise distribution effort across portfolio companies. It is another sign that enterprise AI is moving beyond experiments toward scaled distribution, procurement, and operational rollout.

title: Microsoft launches Copilot Cowork, pushing managed AI agents into daily work
summary: Microsoft introduced Copilot Cowork for Microsoft 365, a service designed to plan multi-step work in the background, surface checkpoints, and request approval before changes are applied. The release shows where the market is headed: from chat assistants toward governed AI agents embedded in real business workflows.
